metaDescription: Premium CDJ, mixer, speaker, and lighting rentals in NYC. Free delivery on orders over $350 across Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Long Island, New Jersey & Connecticut. A security deposit is required on all rentals.

hero.title: Experience Absolute Audio Power
hero.desc: NYC's premium backline, DJ decks, concert active systems, and professional lighting equipment curated for high-end club promoters and private events.

specs.label: Service Area
specs.value: Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Long Island, NJ & CT

about.title: The Standard in Live Production
about.subtitle: Uncompromising Quality. Crystal Clear Rigging.
about.bodyFirst: Soundscape NYC provides event promoters, DJs, and concert planners with premium backline sound systems, high-end Pioneer decks, professional lighting rigs, staging, and CO2 effects across the metropolitan area. We serve downtown Brooklyn, all of Manhattan, Queens, Long Island, New Jersey, and Connecticut with pristine rentals.
about.bodySecond: All of our sound packages are carefully tested and checked. We offer flexible daily rates, and for orders above $350, we include complimentary drop-off and pickup. A security deposit is required on all rentals. Note that installation/connection is not included in our standard rates.

features.title: Concert Backline
features.desc: Pioneer CDJ-3000s, A9 mixers, V10s, and active stand-alone controllers.

features.title: Acoustic Engineering
features.desc: From powered active RCF and FBT speakers to massive HDL 30 Line Arrays.

delivery.notice: A security deposit is required on all rentals.

catalog.noResults: No equipment matches your search criteria.

drawer.title: Rental Cart & Quote Builder
drawer.disclaimer: * Installation/connection not included unless quoted. Free delivery on orders $350+. Security deposit required on all rentals.

quote.intro: I would like to book a custom gear rental rig:
quote.closing: Please let me know availability. Thanks!

footer.description: Premium backline rentals, concert sound systems, and spectacular lighting solutions for NYC's elite nightlife venues, club promoters, and festival rigs.

policies.item: * Installation & connection not included unless stated in quote
* Line Array pricing requires phone check
* Sound technician included with Line Arrays
* Standard equipment is drop-off/pick up only
* Security deposit required on all rentals

footer.tagline: Proudly Made by Blacklist Tech For Soundscape NYC
